doc_title_en: Notice of Revision of Dividend Forecast (Increase) for Fiscal Year Ending June 2026

key_facts.reason_jp: 株主還元と企業価値最大化のための中長期的取組み及び事業拡大に必要な内部留保とのバランスを勘案

summary_en: Year-end dividend for FY6/26 increased to ¥40/share (ordinary ¥35 + commemorative ¥5) from previously forecast ¥35/share. Increase of ¥5/share ordinary dividend from prior forecast of ¥30/share ordinary. Rationale: balance between shareholder returns, internal reserves for business expansion, and medium-to-long-term value creation.
summary_jp: 2026年6月期期末配当を¥40/株（普通¥35+記念¥5）に修正。前回予想¥35より増加。普通配当を前回¥30から¥35に¥5増配。理由：継続的安定配当、中長期企業価値向上と内部留保バランス。
tag_en: Dividend increase - ¥40/share (ordinary ¥35 + commemorative ¥5) from ¥35 previous forecast - FY6/26
tag_jp: 配当増額 - ¥40/株（普通配当¥35+記念配当¥5）前回予想¥35より増加 - 2026年6月期
